description_long: This is a rectangular, dark wood desk with a flat, spacious top surface suitable for writing or computer work. The right side features a column of three drawers with metallic handles, with the bottom drawer shown partially open, revealing a lighter wood interior. The left side is open, providing ample legroom beneath the desk. The desk has a simple, modern design with clean lines and a smooth finish, making it suitable for professional or home office environments. The construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and a solid base. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible damage or excessive wear.
description: A dark wood desk with three right-side drawers and a spacious, flat top, featuring a modern, clean-lined design.
description_view_0: The desk is viewed from the left side, showing a solid panel with no visible drawers or openings.
description_view_1: The front view displays the three drawers on the right, with the bottom drawer open, and an open leg space on the left.
description_view_2: The right side view highlights the side panel and the open bottom drawer, with the lighter wood interior visible.
description_view_3: The back view shows a solid panel running the length of the desk, with no drawers or openings visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three drawers and open leg space, intended for sitting and working at the desk.
